intro: Uragoga amplectens, also known as Uragoga, is a species of flowering plant in the family Menispermaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may aid in treating wounds, infections, and respiratory issues. The bioactive constituents of Uragoga amplectens include alkaloids, specifically berberine, palmatine, and coralyne, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
